description: Structural containment graph exported from SQLite (parity view of the ArangoDB manufacturing_graph physical layer: tables + columns + has_column).

nodes.label: CERTIFICATION
nodes.description: Supplier certification records (CoC, FAI, PPAP, 8130-3, Material Test Report)

nodes.label: INVOICE_HEADER
nodes.description: AP invoice headers linked to purchase orders — three-way match and payment status

nodes.label: LABOR_TICKET
nodes.description: Labor time postings against work order operations (clock-in/out, hours, cost)

nodes.label: MATERIAL_ISSUE
nodes.description: Raw material issues from stock to WIP work orders (quantity, unit cost, total cost)

nodes.label: OPERATION
nodes.description: Work order routing steps — sequence, resource, estimated vs actual hours and costs

nodes.label: PART
nodes.description: Part / item master — description, class, UOM, cost, revision, material spec, CAGE code

nodes.label: PO_LINE
nodes.description: Purchase order line items (part, quantity, unit cost, line total)

nodes.label: PURCHASE_ORDER
nodes.description: Purchase order headers for material and outside-service buys

nodes.label: RECEIVING
nodes.description: Goods receipts against purchase orders — quantity ordered vs received, inspection status

nodes.label: SERVICE
nodes.description: Outside service definitions (anodize, heat treat, NDT, plating, painting)

nodes.label: SHOP_RESOURCE
nodes.description: Shop work centers and outside-service buckets (machine, labor, service types)

nodes.label: WORK_ORDER
nodes.description: Work order master — part, quantity, status, routing template, accumulated actual costs
